caption: In an outdoor setting with a lush green grass lawn and manicured hedges in the background, Rafael Nadal stands smiling while holding a large, ornate silver trophy with a gold-colored base. He is wearing a black short-sleeved t-shirt and a dark wristband on his left wrist. The scene remains static across the frames, with Nadal holding the trophy steady. At the top of the screen, the logo "REUTERS" is visible, accompanied by a banner that reads "VOA 60 LEARNING ENGLISH". A caption at the bottom of the screen consistently states, "Spain's Rafael Nadal won the Australian Open". The lighting is bright and natural, highlighting the reflective surface of the trophy and the green landscape. There are no changes in action or position between the frames, presenting a still portrait of the athlete with his award.
